session.user: Run `uv run ty check src/erk/cli/json_output.py src/erk/cli/ensure.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_remote_dispatch.py` and report results. Do NOT fix any errors.
session.assistant: I'll run the type checking command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/erk/cli/json_output.py src/erk/cli/ensure.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_remote_dispatch.py
Run type checking on json_output and related files

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 error[unresolved-attribute]: Attribute `__name__` is not defined on `(...) -> Any` in union `(Unknown & ~None) | ((...) -> Any)` --> src/erk/cli/json_output.py:76:33 | 74 | raise 75 | 76 | wrapped_callback.__name__ = original_callback.__name__ | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ 77 | wrapped_callback.__doc__ = original_callback.__doc__ 78 | cmd.callback = wrapped_callback | info: rule `unresolved-attribute` is enabled by default
Found 1 diagnostic
session.assistant:
**ty check failed: 1 diagnostic found**
**Error:**
File: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/json_output.py:76:33`
**Issue:** `unresolved-attribute` - Attribute `__name__` is not defined on `(...) -> Any` in union `(Unknown & ~None) | ((...) -> Any)`
The type checker cannot resolve the `__name__` attribute on `original_callback` because the union type includes a callable that might not have this attribute. This occurs at line 76 where the code attempts to access `original_callback.__name__`.
